---
title: "Get Halpern Human Impact Index"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup}



library(sf)
library(raster)
library(tidyverse)
library(tmap)
library(terra)
library(exactextractr)
# Check and install required packages
required_packages <- c(
  "sf", "raster", "terra", "tmap", "exactextractr", "tidyverse"
)
for (pkg in required_packages) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(pkg, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
  }
  require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
}



regions <- tibble::tibble(
  name = c("San Jorge Gulf", "Beagle Channel", "Burdwood Bank", "North Scotia Sea", "South Scotia Sea", "Potter Cove", "Weddell Sea"),
  lon_min = c(-67.7, -68.58, -62, -45 , -53,  -58.73, -35),
  lon_max = c(-65.5, -68.19, -56, -38 , -46 , -58.62, -25),
  lat_min = c(-47. , -54.89, -55, -55 , -62 , -62.21, -78),
  lat_max = c(-45. , -54.79, -53, -48 , -55 , -62.25, -74)
)

# Create sf polygons
region_sf <- regions %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(geometry = list(st_polygon(list(matrix(
    c(lon_min, lat_min,
      lon_max, lat_min,
      lon_max, lat_max,
      lon_min, lat_max,
      lon_min, lat_min),
    ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE))))) %>%
  st_as_sf(crs = 4326)

r <- rast("~/Academicos/GitProjects/Networks/SouthMetawebs/Data/cumulative_impact_2013.tif")
impact_means <- exact_extract(r, region_sf, 'mean')

region_sf$impact_mean <- impact_means


# --- Reproject to Antarctic Polar Stereographic (EPSG:3031) ---
region_sf_proj <- st_transform(region_sf, 3031)
#r_proj <- project(r, "EPSG:3031")
#writeRaster(r_proj, "~/Academicos/GitProjects/Networks/SouthMetawebs/Data/cumulative_impact_2013_proj.tif")
r_proj <- rast("~/Academicos/GitProjects/Networks/SouthMetawebs/Data/cumulative_impact_2013_proj.tif")
  

# --- Mask raster to polygon union ---
poly_union <- st_union(region_sf) %>% st_transform(3031)
r_mask <- mask(crop(r_proj, vect(poly_union)), vect(poly_union))


# --- tmap plot ---
tmap_mode("view")

tmap_mode("plot")
tm_shape(r_mask) +
  tm_raster(style = "cont", palette = "viridis", title = "Impact Index") +
  # Uncomment if bathymetry available:
  # tm_shape(bathy_proj) +
  # tm_raster(style = "cont", palette = "-Blues", alpha = 0.5, title = "Bathymetry") +
  tm_shape(region_sf_proj) +
  tm_borders(lwd = 2, col = "black") +
  tm_basemap("Esri.WorldTopoMap") +
  tm_layout(
    main.title = "Mean Cumulative Human Impact by Region",
    main.title.size = 1.2,
    legend.outside = TRUE
  )

#
#
#

# Impact values without geometry
impact_tbl <- region_sf %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  dplyr::select(name, impact_mean)

# Manual mapping between network_info$site and descriptive names
name_map <- tibble::tibble(
  site = c(
    "BurdwoodBank",
    "GulfSanJorge",
    "PotterCove",
    "Std BeagleChannel",
    "Std Weddell Sea",
    "Std NorthernScotia",
    "Std SouthernScotia"
  ),
  name = c(
    "Burdwood Bank",
    "San Jorge Gulf",
    "Potter Cove",
    "Beagle Channel",
    "Weddell Sea",
    "North Scotia Sea",
    "South Scotia Sea"
  )
)

network_info <- readRDS("Data/network_info.rds")
network_info <- filter(network_info, !(site %in% c("WeddellSea","BeagleChannel","NorthernScotia","SouthernScotia")))

# Join descriptive names and impact values to network_info
network_info <- network_info %>%
  left_join(name_map, by = "site") %>%        # Add descriptive name
  left_join(impact_tbl, by = "name")         

# Save the networks
saveRDS(network_info, "Data/network_info.rds")
```
